allow: Bash(python3 main.py process --paper papers/Human-In-the-Loop.pdf --format html --verbose 2>&1 | head -100)
Bash(git init && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: checkpoint before reorganization")
Bash(git mv main.py cli/ && ls -la cli/)
Bash(git mv DATA_FLOW.md DATA_FLOW_QUICK_REFERENCE.md DATA_VISUALIZATION.md UNDERSTANDING_DATA_FLOW.md PROJECT_SUMMARY.md docs/)

Bash(ls -1 /Users/taoran.wang/Documents/PaperReader/*.md 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\(DATA_FLOW|DATA_VISUALIZATION|UNDERSTANDING|PROJECT_SUMMARY\)" || echo "No target files found in root directory \(expected\)")
Bash(git mv skills/OVERVIEW.md skills/docs/ 2>/dev/null || echo "Already moved or not exist")
Bash(test -f /Users/taoran.wang/Documents/PaperReader/main.py && echo "main.py still in root" || echo "main.py moved from root")
Bash(sed -i '' 's|python main.py|python cli/main.py|g' README.md && sed -i '' 's|./install_skill.sh|./tools/install_skill.sh|g' README.md && echo "Updated README.md")
Bash(find docs/ examples/ skills/ -name "*.md" -type f | xargs sed -i '' 's|python main.py |python cli/main.py |g' && echo "Updated python main.py references")
Bash(find . -name "*.md" -type f | xargs sed -i '' 's|./tool./tools/|./tools/|g' && echo "Fixed incorrect replacements")
Bash(sed -i '' 's|tool\\./tools/|tools/|g' REFACTORING_COMPLETE.md && sed -i '' 's|./tool\\./tools/|./tools/|g' REFACTORING_COMPLETE.md && echo "Fixed REFACTORING_COMPLETE.md")
